title: Learning Resource Selection Flowchart
description: A decision-making flowchart to guide students in selecting the most appropriate learning resources for Module 5 topics.
relationships: Start with Core Textbook for foundational concepts -> If practical application needed, proceed to Online Tutorials and Coding Platforms -> For advanced theory, consult Academic Papers -> For tool-specific knowledge, use Official Documentation and Video Lectures -> Utilize Project Management Tools for hands-on experience -> Engage in Peer Discussion Forums for collaborative learning and problem-solving
